title: What's behind the viral claims of child trafficking on Vinted?
content: Millions have viewed videos claiming that children are being sold through coded advertisements on the popular second-hand online marketplace Vinted. What's behind the rumours?
snippet: Millions have viewed videos claiming that children are being sold through coded advertisements on the popular second-hand online marketplace Vinted. What's behind the rumours?

title: How the Entry-Exit System is becoming a nightmare for Europe's summer travellers
content: The digital system for checking non-EU travellers’ documents is creating bottlenecks and glitches just as the peak of the holiday season approaches. As queues grow longer and passengers get more frustrated, airlines are calling for the option to suspend the checks in July and August.

title: 'Are we serious about war?': EU defence chief calls on countries to live up to security ambitions
content: The Defence Commissioner warned that member states cannot bang the drum for a stronger security architecture while cutting the EU budget, and urged spending that matches their new defence ambitions.
snippet: The Defence Commissioner warned that member states cannot bang the drum for a stronger security architecture while cutting the EU budget, and urged spending that matches their new defence ambitions.

title: Vatican excommunicates Lefebvrists over unauthorised ordinations

snippet: It comes after the controversial ordination of four new bishops carried out without papal approval.

title: MEPs clash in The Ring over the right answers to Europe's scorching heat dome

title: Man charged with sabotage of Nord Stream gas pipeline in German court
content: Nord Stream is a network of pipelines running under the Baltic Sea from Russia to Germany to provide Western Europe with natural gas, meaning it provided billions to the Kremlin's coffers.

title: France's Emmanuel Macron speaks out against global rise in executions

title: Prosecutors conduct Europe-wide raids over alleged misuse of funds by defunct far-right EU group
content: Raids were underway in France, Spain, Italy and Belgium as part of a probe into the alleged misuse of European parliament funds by the former far-right Identity and Democracy (ID) group.
snippet: Raids were underway in France, Spain, Italy and Belgium as part of a probe into the alleged misuse of European parliament funds by the former far-right Identity and Democracy (ID) group.

title: Brussels supports air conditioning—but not as the main answer

title: Bulgaria aims for 'no further cuts on cohesion' in EU's next budget, minister says
content: Bulgaria's Deputy Prime Minister Atanas Pekanov said the EU must "retain policies like cohesion" in its next long-term budget. While acknowledging negotiations "will take months", he backed reaching a deal by the end of the year, saying it is "better to reach a solution fast".

title: Don't block Ukraine's path to EU accession, Zelenskyy asks Hungary and Poland

title: EXCLUSIVE: EU set to reallocate Western Balkans funding in favour of accession 'frontrunners'

snippet: The EU will redirect Western Balkans reform funding towards frontrunners Montenegro, Albania and North Macedonia, as other countries are struggling to keep up with reform deadlines.

title: Ukrainian volunteers in Poland support front despite growing war fatigue
content: A December survey by CBOS, an independent Polish research centre, found that 48% of Poles support accepting Ukrainian refugees, the lowest level since the start of the war.
